agent_checks.summary: 7/8 post-conditions converged. F-15 fixed at current commit (live X/10 polling). F-13 partial: base refund path has no student/admin notification. All invariants passed.

fast_checks.evidence: templates/class-certificate.json: 'name' field present; buildCertificateMetadata maps {{course_title}} to name

DIVERGENCE: 'description' does not appear as a validated input field in certificate-metadata.mjs. The template (templates/class-certificate.json:7) has a hardcoded 'Awarded upon successful completion.' — it is not an input from the caller. The spec requires 'description' to be a validated required metadata field per teacher configuration.

DIVERGENCE: 'instructor' is not a field in certificate-metadata.mjs. The template uses 'teacher' (course.teacher) mapped from inputData.teacher_name — not 'instructor'. The spec requires 'instructor' as a named required field.

DIVERGENCE: web3/contracts/nft-minting-policy.hl has no soul-bound or non-tradeable constraint — only owner signature (tx.is_signed_by(ownerPkh)) and time lock. minting-policy.mjs compiles this contract. No transfer restriction on-chain.
DIVERGENCE: certificate-metadata.mjs contains no soul-bound, non-tradeable, or transfer-restriction field. templates/class-certificate.json contains no such field either.

fast_checks.description: F-05/F-06: CertificateService reads enrolled_certificate_enabled snapshot column
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:474 calls $booking->effectiveCertificateEnabled() which reads enrolled_certificate_enabled from CourseHistory (CourseHistory.php:162). Column access is via model method, not direct SQL.

fast_checks.description: F-06: CertificateService reads enrolled_token_reward_amount snapshot column
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php calls effectiveTokenRewardAmount() which reads enrolled_token_reward_amount from CourseHistory model

fast_checks.description: F-05/F-06: config lock — rejects post-enrollment edits with 422
fast_checks.evidence: DIVERGENCE: No code path found that checks 'has any student enrolled?' and returns HTTP 422 with 'cannot be changed after enrollment'. CertificateService.php, CertificateController.php (API), Admin/CertificateController.php — none contain enrollment lock logic. Snapshot columns are written at enrollment but there is no guard preventing subsequent updates to live course config.

fast_checks.description: F-10: airdrop guard blocks minted/self_minted/minting statuses
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:69 in_array check for ['minted', 'self_minted', 'minting'] under lockForUpdate() at :67

fast_checks.description: F-10: airdrop guard permits delivery when certificate_status is null or failed
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:69-80 — null and 'failed' statuses pass the guard and proceed to mint

fast_checks.description: F-16: RewardInvalidationService sets certificate_status to revoked
fast_checks.evidence: RewardInvalidationService.php:63 updates['certificate_status'] = 'revoked'; includes 'self_minted' in certDelivered check at :47

fast_checks.description: F-16: RewardInvalidationService sets token_reward_status to clawback_flagged

fast_checks.evidence: DIVERGENCE: RewardInvalidationService.php does NOT call revoke-certificate-tx.mjs. It sets certificate_status='revoked' in DB and sends admin notification saying 'Manual on-chain action may be required'. The on-chain revocation call (revokeCertificateOnChain) exists in CertificateService.php:800-836 and is called from CertificateService.php:924, but RewardInvalidationService is the service invoked on refund and it does not trigger on-chain revocation.

fast_checks.description: F-17: RewardsTable renders wallet_type column values
fast_checks.evidence: DIVERGENCE: RewardsTable.jsx does not reference wallet_type anywhere. The spec requires wallet destination sourced from course_histories.wallet_type. The component uses reward.wallet_destination and checks connectedWallet (lines 198-203) — not wallet_type.

fast_checks.description: F-17: RewardsTable renders custodial wallet destination label
fast_checks.evidence: RewardsTable.jsx:146 comment 'Fallback: server-side mint (custodial)'; :203 texts.wallet_custodial || 'Custodial' rendered

fast_checks.description: F-17: RewardsTable renders clawback_flagged status value
fast_checks.evidence: DIVERGENCE: RewardsTable.jsx:24-32 STATUS_CONFIG does not include 'clawback_flagged'. The spec requires delivery status drawn from the set {delivered, pending, failed, revoked, clawback_flagged}. clawback_flagged is absent from STATUS_CONFIG.

fast_checks.description: F-17: RewardsTable renders revoked status value
F-18: StudentMintController sets certificate_status to self_minted on success
F-18: StudentMintController sets certificate_status to failed on mint failure
F-18: No automatic custodial fallback in StudentMintController
F-07: build-certificate-tx.mjs mints both NFT and token in single tx
fast_checks.evidence: DIVERGENCE: build-certificate-tx.mjs mints NFT certificate tokens only (certificateTokenNameRef and certificateTokenName at lines 56-57, 113-119). No token reward minting in this script. F-07 requires a single script that delivers both NFT and fungible token reward in one transaction.

fast_checks.description: F-10: AirdropFeeDialog renders fee before confirmation
fast_checks.evidence: AirdropFeeDialog.jsx contains 'fee' rendering. Certificates.jsx:17 imports AirdropFeeDialog; :39 feeData state; :82 shows dialog with null feeData; :258-261 renders AirdropFeeDialog with feeData prop.

fast_checks.description: F-10: AirdropResultsDialog references AirdropFeeDialog for retry flow
fast_checks.evidence: AirdropResultsDialog.jsx does NOT import AirdropFeeDialog directly, but implements onRetryFailed callback (:25-27) which is handled in Certificates.jsx parent. The retry flow re-opens AirdropFeeDialog via parent state. Post-condition is satisfied architecturally: retry opens a new fee dialog before re-submission.

fast_checks.description: F-19: CourseCompleteConfirmation defines certPending and tokenPending

fast_checks.evidence: web3/run/revoke-certificate-tx.mjs exists; CertificateService.php:810 buildWeb3Command call confirmed

fast_checks.description: Security: no private key material in CertificateService HTTP responses
fast_checks.evidence: CertificateService.php:783 OWNER_PKH is in a PHP doc-comment describing a Node script parameter — not in response-path code

fast_checks.description: Security: no private key material in StudentMintController HTTP responses
Security: no private key material in RewardInvalidationService HTTP responses

post_conditions.description: Teachers enable/configure/disable NFT certificate reward; required metadata fields validated; soul-bound enforced; config locked at enrollment
post_conditions.evidence: Metadata validation present for name, image, course_id, student_name. GAPS: (1) 'description' is hardcoded in template ('Awarded upon successful completion.') — not a teacher-configurable validated field; (2) 'instructor' field named 'teacher_name' in implementation vs 'instructor' in spec; (3) soul-bound constraint absent from both nft-minting-policy.hl and certificate-metadata.mjs — minting policy only enforces owner signature and time lock; (4) enrollment config lock missing — no code rejects edits after enrollment with HTTP 422.

post_conditions.description: Teachers enable/configure/disable token reward; invalid amounts rejected; config locked at enrollment
post_conditions.evidence: Token amount validation present. enrolled_token_reward_amount snapshot read via effectiveTokenRewardAmount(). Gap: enrollment config lock missing (same issue as F-05 item 4).

post_conditions.description: NFT and token rewards configured independently and delivered together in a single on-chain transaction
post_conditions.evidence: Rewards are configured independently — confirmed. Delivery: build-certificate-tx.mjs mints NFT only (lines 56-57, 113-119); build-token-reward-tx.mjs is a separate script. No combined single-transaction delivery exists. A failure in NFT minting and a failure in token minting produce two separate failure records, not one. The single-transaction requirement is unmet.

post_conditions.description: Batch/selective airdrop with fee estimate before confirmation; partial failures with retry; duplicate prevention; platform wallet pays; teacher wallet not required
post_conditions.evidence: AirdropFeeDialog now imported in Certificates.jsx:17 and rendered with feeData. AirdropResultsDialog onRetryFailed re-opens AirdropFeeDialog via parent. Platform wallet pays. Duplicate guard at CertificateService.php:67 uses lockForUpdate(). Gap: F-10 spec states blocking statuses include {delivered, self_minted, pending} — the guard at line 69 blocks ['minted', 'self_minted', 'minting'] which uses 'minting' not 'pending'. The 'pending' status value from F-10 spec is not blocked (though 'minting' serves the same purpose in practice).

post_conditions.description: On refund, certificate status set to revoked (triggering on-chain update) and token flagged for clawback; values not overwritten
post_conditions.evidence: RewardInvalidationService.php:63 sets certificate_status='revoked'; :69 sets token_reward_status='clawback_flagged'. self_minted now included in certDelivered check (:47). Idempotency via rewards_invalidated_at guard (:33). Gap: RewardInvalidationService does NOT call revoke-certificate-tx.mjs — it sends an admin notification that says 'Manual on-chain action may be required'. On-chain revocation is manual, not automatic. The revoke-certificate-tx.mjs script exists and is called from CertificateService.php:924 (self_minted revocation path), but the refund-triggered path in RewardInvalidationService relies on admin manual action only.

post_conditions.description: RewardsTable renders reward type, amount, delivery status from {delivered, pending, failed, revoked, clawback_flagged}, wallet destination from course_histories.wallet_type
post_conditions.evidence: STATUS_CONFIG covers: eligible, pending, minting, minted (shown as 'Delivered'), failed, revoked, not_eligible. Gaps: (1) clawback_flagged absent from STATUS_CONFIG — if token_reward_status is clawback_flagged it would fall through to default label rendering but no dedicated chip; (2) wallet_type column not referenced — component uses reward.wallet_destination and checks connectedWallet state instead of course_histories.wallet_type.

post_conditions.description: Student self-mint via CIP-30 wallet; server builds tx; student signs; server merges and submits; self_minted on success; failed on failure; no custodial fallback
post_conditions.evidence: StudentMintController builds tx server-side; signTx partial=true browser-side; submit-signed-tx.mjs server-side merge; self_minted/failed status recorded; no custodial fallback confirmed via grep_absent.

post_conditions.description: CourseCompleteConfirmation shows eligibility notification and badge; cleared after reward receipt
post_conditions.evidence: CourseCompleteConfirmation.jsx:409-411 certPending, tokenPending, hasEligibilityBadge computed correctly. isAlreadyMinted determines terminal state. Badge and notification rendered when hasEligibilityBadge true.

invariants.description: Only completed students eligible for airdrop/self-mint
invariants.evidence: StudentMintController.php whereNotNull('completed_at') before any mint; CertificateController.php getEligibleStudentsForMinting filters completed students

invariants.description: Minting policy supports on-chain metadata updates for revocation
invariants.evidence: revoke-certificate-tx.mjs exists and is called from CertificateService.php:810; same policy parameterised for revocation updates

invariants.description: Platform wallet pays all airdrop fees; teacher wallet never charged
invariants.evidence: CertificateService.php uses OWNER_WALLET_ADDR for build-certificate-tx.mjs; teacher wallet not referenced in airdrop path

invariants.description: CIP-30 self-mint uses partial sign flow
invariants.evidence: build-student-certificate-tx.mjs owner partial sign; RewardsTable.jsx student signTx(cborTx, true); submit-signed-tx.mjs server merge

invariants.description: NFT certificates are soul-bound; soul-bound constraint in minting-policy.mjs and certificate-metadata.mjs
invariants.evidence: web3/contracts/nft-minting-policy.hl (compiled by minting-policy.mjs) has NO transfer restriction — only owner signature and time lock. certificate-metadata.mjs has no soul-bound or non-tradeable field. NFT certificates are freely tradeable on-chain. Invariant violated.

agent_checks.summary: F-07 drifted: NFT and token delivered in separate transactions, not one. F-05 partial: description hardcoded, instructor misnamed, soul-bound absent, enrollment lock missing. F-06 partial: enrollment lock missing. F-10 partial: fee dialog now wired; pending vs minting terminology gap. F-16 partial: on-chain revocation is manual (admin notification only) for refund path. F-17 partial: clawback_flagged absent from STATUS_CONFIG; wallet_type not used. F-18 converged. F-19 converged. Soul-bound invariant violated.
